author: DominicVainMod
content:
Starpath - Upcoming Sunset Notice

Hey everyone, the current version of Starpath, our referral program, will be permanently ending in two weeks on . You’ll still be able to claim your current pending rewards through Buddylink after the sunset. However, no new referral rewards will be transferred once the program ends.

This is not the end for Starpath. We are actively exploring a new and improved version that better rewards the people it was made for. We will share more details as soon as we are ready.

Thanks! 

@All Pings @here
